text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: At last, we have reached the finalchapter. Onward to Origins of theCenturial Overlord Act III!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Before this camp ends, I'll have<n>broken through
my oppressive<n>competition and claimed
indubitable<n>victory. I will be born again—a brand
new Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I await Poseidon, god of the<n>sea... and the
power he shall grant<n>unto me!
